---
title: "Title"
subtitle: "&nbsp;"
author: Rodney Dyer, PhD
format: dyerlab-revealjs
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_extensions/dyerlab/theme_dyerlab.R")
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_dyerlab())
```


# Section Divider {.section-divider}



<!-- Title + text -->
## Slide Title

This is some content.


## A Slide with Code

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-alt: "Histogram of 1200 random normal values"
ggplot(data.frame(x = rnorm(1200)), aes(x)) +
  geom_histogram( bins = 30) +
  labs(x = "Value", y = "Count")
```



<!-- Two columns: variable width with fragment reveal -->
## Two Columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
Narrow content
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.fragment}
Wide content revealed on click
:::
:::

::::


<!-- Two columns: equal with H3 column headers -->
## Column Comparison

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Left Heading

- Item A
- Item B
- Item C
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Right Heading

- Item X
- Item Y
- Item Z
:::

::::


<!-- Code example (shown) + executed output (hidden) -->
## Code & Output

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### The Code

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
hist(rnorm(1200))
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### The Plot

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-alt: "Histogram of 1200 random normal values"
ggplot(data.frame(x = rnorm(1200)), aes(x)) +
  geom_histogram( bins = 30) +
  labs(x = "Value", y = "Count")
```
:::

::::


<!-- Code-only slide -->
## Code

```{r}
#| echo: true
px  <- 0.75
py  <- 0.25
m   <- 0.1
ret <- rep(NA, 100)
ret[1] <- py
for (i in 2:100) {
  ret[i] <- (1 - m) * ret[(i - 1)] + px * m
}
```


<!-- Results slide -->
## Results

```{r}
#| fig-alt: "Line plot showing allele frequency converging over 100 generations"
ggplot(data.frame(gen = seq_along(ret), freq = ret), aes(gen, freq)) +
  geom_line( linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Allele Frequency over Time",
       x = "Generation", y = "Frequency")
```
